name: HiPay
description: HiPay is a European omnichannel payment platform headquartered in Levallois-Perret, France, offering REST APIs for online payments, in-store terminal management, fraud prevention, 3DS authentication, tokenization, marketplace payments, and payment reporting. Founded in 2011, HiPay is listed on Euronext Growth Paris and processes over €7.5 billion in transactions annually across five European countries.

itemListElement.name: HiPay Payment Gateway API
itemListElement.description: Allows merchants to get paid and manage orders and transactions. Supports querying orders, retrieving transactions by multiple identifiers, and discovering available payment products and routing options.

itemListElement.name: HiPay Enterprise Gateway API
itemListElement.description: Enables payment processing and transaction management, supporting both credit/debit card payments and alternative payment methods.

itemListElement.name: HiPay Enterprise HostedPage API
itemListElement.description: Allows merchants to create secure, PCI-compliant hosted payment pages that customers can be redirected to or displayed in an iFrame.

itemListElement.name: HiPay Enterprise Finance API
itemListElement.description: Consolidates sales and settlements for merchant accounts, providing access to settlement details including amounts transferred to bank accounts, sales, refunds, fees, and chargebacks.

itemListElement.name: HiPay Enterprise Tokenization API
itemListElement.description: Enables merchants to securely tokenize payment card data in HiPay's Secure Vault, eliminating the need to store sensitive cardholder information locally.

itemListElement.name: HiPay Apple Pay Web API
itemListElement.description: Enables merchants to request valid Apple Pay payment sessions from Apple servers, supporting Apple Pay integration in web applications.

itemListElement.name: HiPay POS API
itemListElement.description: Enables in-store payments by waking point-of-sale terminal devices with payment details and creating corresponding transactions in HiPay Console.

itemListElement.name: HiPay Omnichannel Gateway API
itemListElement.description: Allows merchants to process in-store and omnichannel payments, manage orders and transactions without customer redirection, and perform maintenance operations.

itemListElement.name: HiPay Marketplace API
itemListElement.description: Facilitates connections between marketplace platforms and HiPay for split payment management, KYC/KYB onboarding, UBO declarations, banking information, fund transfers, and withdrawals.
